items.title: cProfile
items.description: cProfile answers 'where is the time?'; memory profilers answer 'where is the RAM?'. Most serious perf work needs both.

items.title: Time-Space Tradeoffs
items.description: Memory profiles inform the right space/time tradeoff (numpy vs list, mmap vs in-memory, batch size).

items.title: Logging for Debugging
items.description: RSS dashboards + structured logs of allocations make leak detection in production possible.

items.title: Notebooks Best Practices
items.description: Notebook kernels hold every variable forever; memory profilers reveal which cells are responsible for kernel bloat.

items.title: Reusable Modules
items.description: Module-level singletons, caches and lazy-loaded models are common sources of memory growth.
